column17: Chart Designer: Dr. Thomas R. Nicely

column2: Buffalo started the year strong going 3-1 and 5-2 before ultimately fading down the stretch to finish 8-8.  The offense was not very good and was shut out twice and held to 14 points or less in half their games. The offense finished 23rd of 28 teams in points, 25th in yards, 18th in passing yards, and 24th in rushing yards despite Joe Cribbs 1131 rushing yards.  The defense, a stallwarth of Chuck Knox coached teams, also fell hard coming in 18th in points allowed and passing yards allowed and 24th in total yards allowed and rushing yards allowed.  The 33-year-old Joe Ferguson barely missed out on his this 3000-yard season, throwing for 2995 yards and a career-high 26 touchdowns.
